questionHtml:
Which is an example of natural selection?

A. A giraffe stretching its neck to reach higher leaves

B. A juvenile bird learning to sing

C. Development of antibiotic resistance in bacteria

D. Selective breeding of tail-less cats

meta.title: Which is an example of natural selection? A. A giraffe stretching its neck to reach higher leaves B. A juvenile bird learning to sing C. Development of antibiotic resistance in bac
breadcrumbLabels: D4.1.1. Natural selection as the mechanism driving evolutionary change
D4.1.5. Differences between individuals in adaptation, survival and reproduction as the basis for natural selection
